purpose: Greedy insertion trip planner. Takes a validated TravelInput and returns a TravelOutput with the cheapest feasible route connecting origin → stops → origin, within the budget. Uses reward/added_cost ratio (effectively min-cost per greedy step). Populates route, summary, budget_expansion, and diff (None for fresh plans). Called after validator.validate() passes.

input_schema.required_prevalidated: Yes — caller MUST call validator.validate() first and check status==SUCCESS before calling plan()

success.route: list[Segment] — ordered legs: origin→stop[0], stop[0]→stop[1], ..., stop[N]→origin
success.stops: list[Stop] — passed through unchanged from input

summary.total_cost: float — sum of all segment costs
summary.total_duration_minutes: int — sum of all segment durations
summary.total_carbon_kg: float — sum of segment carbon emissions

partial.error_message: Route cost N exceeds budget B
partial.route: list[Segment] — segments built before budget was exceeded

update_method.description: Incremental update — given an existing base TravelOutput and new TravelInput, computes Diff (added_segments, removed_segments, cost_delta, time_delta_minutes, reason) without a full replan

pseudocode:
# routing_engine.py

# ── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# CARBON_PER_KM — kg CO2 / passenger-km per TransportMode (from shared_schemas)
# _COST_MATRIX — precomputed (from_city, to_city, mode) → (cost_cny, duration_min, dist_km)
# _CITY_COORDS — city → (lat, lng) for haversine fallback
# _MODE_RATE — mode → (CNY/km, min/km) fallback when matrix miss

# ── _best_segment ────────────────────────────────────────────
def _best_segment(from_city, from_lat, from_lng,
                  to_city, to_lat, to_lng,
                  modes, pref, day) -> Segment:
    # For each allowed mode:
    #   cost, dur, dist = _lookup(from_city, to_city, mode)
    #   carbon = dist * CARBON_PER_KM[mode]
    #   score  = _score(cost, dur, dist, pref)  # lower = better
    #   candidates.append(Segment(...))
    # Return best candidate by preference:
    #   TIME   → min by duration_minutes
    #   SCENIC → max by score (most walk-friendly)
    #   COST   → min by cost

# ── _lookup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _lookup(from_city, to_city, mode):
    # 1. Check _COST_MATRIX
    # 2. Fallback: haversine(from_city_coords, to_city_coords)
    #    then cost = dist * rate_per_km; dur = dist * min_per_km

# ── RoutingEngine.plan() ──────────────────────────────────────
def plan(self, inp: TravelInput) -> TravelOutput:
    route = []
    seg_cost = 0.0
    seg_time = 0
    prev_city, prev_lat, prev_lng = origin

    # origin → stops[0]
    seg = _best_segment(origin, stops[0], modes, pref, arrival_date)
    route.append(seg); seg_cost += seg.cost; seg_time += seg.duration_minutes
    update prev to stops[0]

    # stops[i] → stops[i+1]
    for each adjacent stop pair:
        seg = _best_segment(a, b, modes, pref, b.arrival_date)
        if seg_cost + seg.cost > inp.budget:
            # try walking instead
            walk_seg = _best_segment(a, b, [WALK], COST, b.arrival_date)
            if seg_cost + walk_seg.cost <= inp.budget:
                seg = walk_seg
            else:
                return _budget_exceeded(...)
        route.append(seg); seg_cost += seg.cost

    # final stop → origin (walk only)
    walk_home = _best_segment(last_stop, origin, [WALK], COST, end_date)
    if seg_cost + walk_home.cost <= inp.budget:
        route.append(walk_home)

    # build summary + budget_expansion
    return TravelOutput(route=route, stops=inp.stops, summary=...,
                        budget_expansion=..., diff=None,
                        status=SUCCESS, error_code=OK)

# ── RoutingEngine.update() ────────────────────────────────────
def update(self, base: TravelOutput, inp: TravelInput) -> TravelOutput:
    new_plan = self.plan(inp)
    added   = segments in new_plan.route not in base.route
    removed = segments in base.route not in new_plan.route
    diff = Diff(added, removed,
                cost_delta=new.total_cost - base.total_cost,
                time_delta=new.time - base.time,
                reason=ADDED_STOP)
    return replace(new_plan, diff=diff)
